name: LiveGolf Studios at Macatawa Golf Club
about: LiveGolf Studios at Macatawa Golf Club offers a modern indoor golf experience featuring state-of-the-art TrackMan simulators. The venue provides access to over 100 golf courses, various challenge games, and practice ranges, catering to golfers of all skill levels. Located within Macatawa Golf Club, it combines golf simulation with a full-service bar and food offerings, making it suitable for casual play, date nights, and group events.
why_golfers_like_it: TrackMan 4 technology provides industry-leading accuracy and course simulation
Year-round access to 100+ golf courses and challenge games
Family-friendly atmosphere with kid-friendly games and discounts
Convenient location within Macatawa Golf Club with food and drink options

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar service with beer, cocktails, and wine

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players should bring their own golf clubs to use with the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed. The venue offers food and drinks from RedRock Grille.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, 18 holes take approximately 2-3 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers kid-friendly games, mini golf challenges, and $5 discounts for children (up to 4 kids per reservation).
